body: This is necessary to interpolate onto a free surface that is a `ZFaceField(grid; indices=(:, :, size(grid, 3)+1))`
title: Support interpolating onto `Windowed` fields

body:
the code for `tupled_fill_halo_regions!` seems to have become a bit more complicated.

The distributed fill halo regions for CATKE is broken because non-fields are passed to the `tupled_fill_halo_regions!` function.
This PR fixes it and adds a test
title: Correct `tupled_halo_filling` for distributed fields

body: This PR allows the automatic finding of the axis labels for immersed boundaries and for Observables of Fields.
title: Minor enhancement in OceananigansMakieExt
